cities.name: Seoul
cities.notes: Gyeongbokgung Palace, Hongdae nightlife, K-pop and street food

cities.name: Busan
cities.notes: Jagalchi fish market, Gamcheon village and Haeundae beach

cities.name: Jeju
cities.notes: Volcanic island with Hallasan hike, waterfalls and black lava beaches

cities.name: Gyeongju
cities.notes: Open-air museum with Silla dynasty royal tombs and Bulguksa temple

cities.name: Incheon
cities.notes: Colorful Chinatown, Songdo smart city and gateway to the archipelago
